name: Pesto Biscuits (Ovo-lacto)
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Buttermilk powder or nonfat dry milk powder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together flour, buttermilk or milk powder, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. With a pastry cutter, cut in shortening and pesto until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Make a well in the center of the mixture; add water all at once.
4. Stir in just enough to form a dough that clings together.
5. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface. Knead gently for 10 to 12 strokes.
6. Roll or pat into rounds with a thickness of 1/2 inch.
7. Cut with a 2 1/2-inch biscuit cutter, dipping the cutter into flour between cuts.
8. Place biscuits on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake in a 450°F oven for 8 to 10 minutes or until golden. Makes 10 to 12 biscuits.
Nutri info per serving: 175 cal, 8 g fat, 2 mg chol, 4 g pro, 21 g carbo, 1 g fibre, 180 mg sodium, 21% USRDA thiamine, 14% USRDA riboflavin, 11% USRDA niacin.
